DESMI ·Pumps & Valves

DESMI NSL / NSLV / NSLH Centrifugal Pump

Spare parts for DESMI NSL / NSLV / NSLH vertical in-line centrifugal pumps (sizes 65–250 mm).

Parts catalog
How to use this list: Part numbers match OEM service manuals. Use the request button below to ask about availability and pricing. Include the part number, quantity, and delivery port.
SPARE PARTS KIT 677584 – NSL/NSLV/NSLH 65–200 × 265 17
Part NumberDescription
677584Kit complete – NSL 80–200-265 designs /02 & /16 (covers 30 pump variants)
712098Mechanical Shaft Seal (standard nitrile – primary seal type)
712239Mechanical Shaft Seal (alternate seal type – check pump spec)
704019V-Ring (primary seal type)
721935V-Ring (alternate seal type)
703111Washer / Snap Ring
706804Bearing
702424Supporting Ring
706401O-Ring (casing/cover – primary) (alt: 507139)
516012Gasket (pump casing joint)
708161O-Ring (bearing housing) (alt: 711364)
704188Sealing Washer
708119O-Ring (bearing housing – alternate)
700018Key (shaft key)
706814O-Ring (general / impeller area)
707124O-Ring (small – qty 100 in kit; reorder as needed)
114173-02Tool – Replacement of Mechanical Shaft Seal
SPARE PARTS KIT 677570 – NSL/NSLV 65–250 × 265 13
Part NumberDescription
677570Kit complete – NSL 65–250 × 265 designs /14 & /15
712098Mechanical Shaft Seal (nitrile – primary)
704019V-Ring (primary)
703111Snap Ring (bearing retainer)
706191Bearing (main – primary position)
702424Supporting Ring
704029Bearing (second position)
706401O-Ring (casing joint) (alt: 516012)
704185Sealing Washer
110571Gasket (qty 4 – manifold/cover)
731100Pointed Screw (cover retention)
114173-02Tool – Replacement of Mechanical Shaft Seal
–see 677584–(Shared alternate seal parts same as kit 677584 – 712239, 721935, 704188, 708119, 700018, 706814, 707124)

704185Sealing Washer

Part NumberDescription
NSL80-265/A02NSL 80-265/A02 complete pump – Type 672770 – 90 m³/h (alt: 672770)

Part NumberDescription
Pos. APump Casing
Pos. JDrive Screw (main rotor)
Pos. ABIdler (driven rotor)
Pos. ACIdler Pin
Pos. ADIdler Bushing
Pos. AAFront Cover
Pos. BARear Cover

We source and deliver maritime and industrial spare parts globally. Engine components, pumps, navigation equipment, sensors, electrical, and auxiliary equipment. Emergency timelines and obsolete items handled.
